repositories.name: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
repositories.description: Unifies Cast, Android/Google TV, ADB, DLNA renderer and manufacturer media players into one normal Home Assistant device per physical TV, with safe Sony BRAVIA/MediaRenderer consolidation, explicit manual physical-device merging, persistent identity, capability routing, dynamic metadata, apps, inputs, activities, Wake-on-LAN, diagnostics, Repairs and opt-in positive-detection YouTube ad skipping.

repositories.name: Unified TV Card
repositories.description: Container-responsive TV controller card with grouped dynamic TV/Cast app selection, a separate input selector, managed favourites, activities, mute beside volume, playback, remote controls, artwork, diagnostics and auto-discovered YouTube ad-skip controls.
